summary: Correct README + SKILL auth docs: email/password `auth login` is blocked at the Function Health project level and `auth login --chrome` is unreliable; document the DevTools token extraction -> `auth set-token` path and add a Known Gaps section.
reason: The generated docs claimed email/password login works and auto-refreshes; in reality Firebase REST password sign-in is blocked (retro #1) and the chrome flow doesn't capture a refresh token (retro #2). Also notes that a pure-Go IndexedDB LevelDB reader is the planned long-term auth fix.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Pure-Go IndexedDB LevelDB reader to extract Firebase tokens from Chrome without a browser shell-out
deferred_to_upstream.reason: browser-use against a sandboxed profile is unreliable; reading Chrome's IndexedDB directly would make `auth login --chrome` durable.
